name: Lutra AI
description: Lutra AI — AI agent that writes and runs Python code to automate workflows. Connects to Gmail, Sheets, Slack, Notion, and custom APIs.

seo.title: Lutra AI — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Lutra AI: Lutra AI — AI agent that writes and runs Python code to automate workflows. Connects to Gmail, Sheets, Slack, Notion, and custom APIs.

when_to_use: AI agent writing Python to automate a Gmail inbox workflow
Connecting Sheets, Slack, and Notion via AI-generated code
Custom API integration automated without writing code manually
Data extraction and enrichment run by a Python-writing AI agent
Automating weekly reporting by orchestrating AI-coded data flows

pros: AI writes and runs Python workflows
cons: Overlaps with Bardeen, Otto, Zapier AI
review.verdict: Interesting code-transparent AI agent approach — promising but still competing in a crowded AI-ops space.
review.best_for: Technical operators who want AI automation with visible Python code they can audit
review.not_for: Non-technical users uncomfortable with code or teams needing enterprise governance

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
